\pgfsys@transformcm{1.0}{0.0}{0.0}{1.0}{15.64897pt}{12.18065pt}\pgfsys@invoke{% }\hbox{{\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\hbox{\minipage[b]{313.7% 0206pt}\color[rgb]{0,0,0}\definecolor[named]{pgfstrokecolor}{rgb}{0,0,0}% \pgfsys@color@gray@stroke{0}\pgfsys@color@gray@fill{0}\ignorespaces% \ignorespaces\par\addpenalty{\@beginparpenalty}\hbox{\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0% .0pt\hbox to313.70206pt{{Context:\ "The\ the\ Transformers.}\hss}\hss}\penalty 0\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt% \hbox to313.70206pt{{The\ series\ was\ previewed\ with\ a\ #0\ in\ October,\ 2% 005,\ formally}\hss}\hss}\penalty 0\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.% 70206pt{{launched\ with\ #1\ in\ January\ 2006\ and\ ended\ with\ #6\ in\ July% .}\hss}\hss}\penalty 0\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.70206pt{{% Written\ by\ long-time\ Transformers\ writer\ Simon\ Furman,\ it\ is\ a\ new}% \hss}\hss}\penalty 0\hbox to313.70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.70206pt{{origin% \ for\ the\ Generation\ 1\ Transformers."}\hss}\hss}{\penalty 150}\hbox to313.% 70206pt{\kern 0.0pt\hbox to313.70206pt{{Query:\ "What\ are\ transformers?"}% \hss}\hss}\@endparenv\endminipage}}}\pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope}% \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope \pgfsys@invoke{ }\pgfsys@endscope{}{}{}\hss}\pgfsys@discardpath\pgfsys@invoke{% }\pgfsys@endscope\hss}}\endpgfpicture}}

text.text: Context: "The Transformers: Infiltration is a six-issue comic book

p.text: mini-series, published by IDW Publishing, based on the Transformers.
The series was previewed with a #0 in October, 2005, formally
launched with #1 in January 2006 and ended with #6 in July.
Written by long-time Transformers writer Simon Furman, it is a new
